posts.author: PiratePatriotParrot
posts.title:
The H-1B isn't just about immigration,  it's India’s biggest outsourcing engine.

Here’s how it works:

• One Indian worker gets an H-1B
• They become a manager or gatekeeper
• Then they offshore the work back to India
• Now 10 remote workers in India rely on that one visa
